chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No. 1396 of 2008 Date Order with Signature of Judge For examination of parties/settlement of issues 15.05.2023 Mr.Bashir Ahmed, Advocate for Plaintiff ---------- Counsel for Plaintiff submits an application under Order 23 Rule 1 CPC. Office to allocate a docket number to the said Application. The Plaintiff no longer wishes to proceed with this lis. The Application is signed by the Plaintiff and his Advocate. Accordingly this suit is disposed off along with all pending applications. J U D G E Ashraf
